chapters.title: — Cold Open: What Changed This Week
— Round 2: Chen (Cardiac MRI, MVO, MACE Prediction)
— Close: What to Watch, What's Unsettled

follow_up_links.reason: First prospective multicenter trial demonstrating ultrasound non-inferiority to PET/CT and DW-MRI for pelvic node staging in cervical cancer — directly informs resource allocation and staging protocols
follow_up_links.title: Prospective comparison of diagnostic accuracy of ultrasound, PET/CT and DW-MRI for preoperative assessment of pelvic lymph nodes in cervical cancer patients: results of the CANNES trial

follow_up_links.reason: Provides pooled external validation benchmarks for AI lung nodule classifiers — essential for understanding real-world performance expectations
follow_up_links.title: Externally Tested AI Models for Malignancy Classification of Lung Nodules at Chest CT: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis

follow_up_links.reason: Demonstrates AI radiomic features from automated MVO segmentation can outperform manual quantification for MACE prediction — early signal for prognostic AI in cardiac imaging
follow_up_links.title: AI-based Histologic Heterogeneity of Microvascular Obstruction at Cardiac MRI for Predicting MACEs: A Multicenter Study

follow_up_links.reason: Validates a simple dual-line midbrain index across 2,111 participants for PSP differentiation — methodologic model for imaging biomarker development
follow_up_links.title: Planimetric and Linear MRI Markers for Progressive Supranuclear Palsy Classification: A Large Multicohort International Study

follow_up_links.reason: Confirms updated LI-RADS TRA v2024 with ancillary features improves HCC viability assessment — relevant for structured reporting algorithm evolution
follow_up_links.title: Evaluating Accuracy of LI-RADS Nonradiation Treatment Response Algorithm v2024 and Ancillary Features at Hepatobiliary MRI versus CT

key_claims.claim: Ultrasound is non-inferior to PET/CT and DW-MRI for preoperative pelvic lymph node staging in cervical cancer when performed by experienced operators in a standardized protocol
Externally validated AI models for lung nodule malignancy classification achieve pooled sensitivity of 88% and specificity of 75% across heterogeneous study populations
AI-derived radiomic heterogeneity scores from automated MVO segmentation on cardiac MRI predict MACEs after STEMI better than manual MVO quantification alone
A dual-line midbrain MRI index outperforms existing planimetric measures for differentiating PSP from other parkinsonian syndromes
LI-RADS treatment response algorithm version 2024 with ancillary features on hepatobiliary-phase MRI improves HCC viability assessment compared to prior versions and CT
